perf.regime: One program per batch row: coalesced read of V probs into registers, fp32 tl.cumsum prefix scan, then argmax over (cdf > u) to find the leftmost crossing (the sampled token), V-1 fallback. BLOCK_V=next_pow2(V). Memory-bound on the [B,V] probs read; the [B,V] cdf is kept in registers (never materialized). num_warps=4.

notes: Deterministic given the external uniform_samples input (the RNG is outside the kernel). The token is the leftmost vocab index whose cumulative prob first exceeds the draw; tl.argmax returns the lowest index on ties so the leftmost-crossing semantics match torch.searchsorted(right=True) bit-for-bit on well-separated distributions. BLOCK_V=next_pow2(V) is a tl.constexpr derived from the dispatch V (cached by Triton) -- NOT a user specialization_knob. Portable (pure tl.cumsum + tl.argmax, no vendor intrinsics); the AMD gfx942 card is the port-across-arch follow-up (the issue's primary target). The production 100k+ vocab path needs a staged streaming scan (same limitation as temperature_softmax); this card targets moderate V (<= a few thousand).
